# Conclusions

## Future Work
In addition to the participants described above, Investigation 1 will recruit 20-30 participants from local manufacturing companies. The same requirements, recruiting, consent, and onboarding procedures will apply, and the experimental protocol is unchanged, except that those participants will be compensated.


Additionally, the industry recruitment will allow us to compare the results between our initial convenience sample and a more representative population to see how well the results generalize. IRB approved - one participant from first recruitment effort. All subjects recruited from the local manufacturing industry will be offered gift cards in exchange for their participation. This is considered important to the success of that recruitment. All industry volunteers will be given $40 in cash / gift card at the completion of their participation.
